item.title: 2007 Triumph Bonneville T100
item.description:
Engine Type: DOHC, parallel-twin, 360 degree firing interval
Displacement: 865 cc
Bore and Stroke: 90 x 68 mm
Cooling: Air-cooled
Compression Ratio: 9.2:1
Fuel System: Twin carburetors with throttle position sensor and electric carburetor heaters
Ignition: Digital - inductive type
Front Suspension: 41mm forks
Rear Suspension: Chromed spring twin shocks with adjustable preload
Front Brakes: Single 310mm disc, 2 piston caliper
Rear Brakes: Single 255mm disc, 2 piston caliper
Front Tire: 100/90 19
Rear Tire: 130/80 17

Rake: 28 deg.
Trail: 110 mm
Fuel Capacity: 4.4 gal.
Dry Weight: 451 lbs.
Transmission: 5-speed
Final Drive: X ring chain
Colors: Jet Black/Opal White, Jet Black/Tornado Red

item.title: 2022 Ducati Scrambler 1100 Dark PRO
item.description:
Engine Type: L-Twin, Desmodromic distribution, 2 valves per cylinder
Displacement: 1,079 cc
Bore and Stroke: 98 x 71 mm
Cooling: Air
Compression Ratio: 11:1
Fuel System: Electronic fuel injection, Ø55 mm throttle body with full Ride by Wire (RbW)
Transmission: 6 speed
Final Drive: Chain; Front sprocket 15; Rear sprocket 39
Front Suspension: Marzocchi fully adjustable Ø45 mm usd fork
Rear Suspension: Kayaba monoshock, pre-load and rebound adjustable
Front Brakes: 2 x Ø320 mm semi-floating discs, radially mounted Brembo Monobloc M4.32 callipers, 4-piston, axial pump with Bosch Cornering ABS as standard equipment
Rear Brakes: Ø245 mm disc, 1-piston floating calliper with Bosch Cornering ABS as standard equipment
Wheelbase: 59.6 in. (1,514 mm)

Rake: 24.5 deg.
